trabuco.description: Trabuco CLI's MCP server. Exposes 14 tools (init_project, add_module, suggest_architecture, design_system, generate_workspace, scan_project, migrate_project, run_doctor, get_project_info, list_modules, list_providers, check_docker, get_version, auth_status), 4 expert prompts (trabuco_expert, design_microservices, extend_project, trabuco_ai_agent_expert), and 3 resources (trabuco://modules, trabuco://patterns, trabuco://limitations). Requires `trabuco` binary on PATH — install from https://github.com/arianlopezc/Trabuco/releases.
